title: Cavaliers clinch Women’s Division 2 T20 title
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers claimed...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers claimed the Women's Division 2 T20 title on Sunday 16 February, with an impressive 91-run victory over Plett Pioneers, continuing their dominance in local cricket.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers claimed the Women's Division 2 T20 title on Sunday 16 February, with an impressive 91-run victory over Plett Pioneers, continuing their dominance in local cricket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final was played in Oudtshoorn at the Recreational Ground.","html":"The final was played in Oudtshoorn at the Recreational Ground."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Opting to bat first, the Cavaliers posted a competitive total of 124 runs, all out, in 24.3 overs.","html":"Opting to bat first, the Cavaliers posted a competitive total of 124 runs, all out, in 24.3 overs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Superb knock","html":"Superb knock"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Leading the charge with the bat was Kemrodiene Swartz, who played a superb knock of 57 not out, anchoring the innings with steady composure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, it was the Cavaliers' bowlers who really stole the show.","html":"However, it was the Cavaliers' bowlers who really stole the show."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the ball, Swartz was equally outstanding, taking 3 wickets for just 9 runs. She was well supported by Brenda-Leigh Fredericks (2/4) and Kim Malgas (2/10), who helped reduce the Pioneers to a meagre total.","html":"With the ball, Swartz was equally outstanding, taking 3 wickets for just 9 runs. She was well supported by Brenda-Leigh Fredericks (2/4) and Kim Malgas (2/10), who helped reduce the Pioneers to a meagre total."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bowlers fired up","html":"Bowlers fired up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers, chasing down 125 for victory, struggled against a fired-up Cavaliers bowling attack.","html":"Plett Pioneers, chasing down 125 for victory, struggled against a fired-up Cavaliers bowling attack."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They were bowled out for a paltry 33 runs in just 15.1 overs. The Cavaliers' dominant performance ensured a commanding 91-run victory.","html":"They were bowled out for a paltry 33 runs in just 15.1 overs. The Cavaliers' dominant performance ensured a commanding 91-run victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the aftermath of this thrilling victory, coach Byron Jantjies expressed his pride in the side.","html":"In the aftermath of this thrilling victory, coach Byron Jantjies expressed his pride in the side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victorious Cavaliers team","html":"The victorious Cavaliers team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Extra mile'","html":"'Extra mile'"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We were always willing to go the extra mile, and that mindset has paid huge dividends,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I couldn't be prouder of the way the team have carried themselves.","html":"\"I couldn't be prouder of the way the team have carried themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Division 1","html":"Division 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Next year, we'll be stepping up to Division 1, where the competition will be even tougher, but we are looking forward to the challenge.\"","html":"\"Next year, we'll be stepping up to Division 1, where the competition will be even tougher, but we are looking forward to the challenge.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This defeat marks the third consecutive season that Plett Pioneers have fallen short in the final, while the Cavaliers celebrate their well-deserved triumph.","html":"This defeat marks the third consecutive season that Plett Pioneers have fallen short in the final, while the Cavaliers celebrate their well-deserved triumph."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
